hero.title: Silent Whispers Wiki
hero.description: Explore Silent Whispers, a free-to-play UE5 cinematic love adventure set in the City of Fading Light, covering romance, time-loop survival choices, urban exploration, characters, trailers, and pre-registration rewards.

gameFeature.title: Silent Whispers Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Explore cinematic romance, first-person interactions, freeform urban exploration, and time-loop survival in this UE5 love adventure for PC, iOS, and Android.

silentWhispersReleaseDateAndPlatforms.title: Silent Whispers Release Date, Platforms, and Publisher
silentWhispersReleaseDateAndPlatforms.intro: Track the essential launch information for Silent Whispers, including its release status, confirmed platforms, developer, publisher, and public storefront details. The game has been announced globally, with several launch details to follow through official channels.

items.label: Release Status
items.details: Silent Whispers was announced as an upcoming free-to-play cinematic love adventure game.

items.label: Release Date
items.details: The exact global release date for PC, iOS, and Android will be confirmed through official channels.

items.label: Confirmed Platforms
items.details: The official announcement lists PC, iOS, and Android as the target platforms.

items.label: Developer
items.details: VVANNA STUDIO is the development studio working on Silent Whispers.

items.label: Publisher
items.details: Archosaur Games publishes Silent Whispers and operates the official website.

items.label: Business Model
items.details: Silent Whispers is a free-to-play game, with paid systems and content details to be shared closer to launch.

items.label: Engine
items.details: The game uses Unreal Engine 5 for its cinematic visual presentation.

items.label: Storefront
items.details: The official website is live with pre-registration. App Store, Google Play, and PC client pages will be linked as they go public.

silentWhispersPreRegistrationRewards.title: Silent Whispers Pre-Registration Rewards
silentWhispersPreRegistrationRewards.intro: Global pre-registration is open through the official Silent Whispers website. Registered players are tied to launch rewards including the Sonnet avatar title, a Theron-related event reward, Stamina, and Eclipse Coins.

items.name: Official Pre-Registration
items.description: Players can pre-register through the official Silent Whispers website using the registration form.
items.claim_context: Launch reward delivery will be handled through the game once service begins.

items.name: Sonnet
items.description: Sonnet is listed as a pre-registration avatar title reward.
items.claim_context: Included in the launch reward set for pre-registered players.

items.name: Theron Event Reward
items.description: A Theron-related event reward named "It's not like I'm posing for you." is part of the pre-registration bonuses.
items.claim_context: Connected to Theron and the pre-registration reward campaign.

items.name: Stamina
items.description: Stamina is listed as part of the pre-registration reward bundle.
items.claim_context: Useful as an early-game resource once the game launches.

items.name: Eclipse Coins
items.description: Eclipse Coins are listed as the main currency reward in the pre-registration bundle.
items.claim_context: Included with the launch rewards for players who pre-register.

silentWhispersCharacters.title: Meet the Main Characters in Silent Whispers
silentWhispersCharacters.intro: Silent Whispers has revealed three main romance characters so far: Alarik, Theron, and Valen. Each character is presented through official descriptions, PV appearances, and multilingual voice clips.

items.name: Alarik
items.story_profile: Alarik is framed as an overwhelming figure of authority and power, positioned above ordinary rules and tied to dominance, control, and eternity.
items.voice_info: Official character voice clips are available in Chinese, English, and Japanese.
items.known_from: Official website, World Premiere PV, Real-Time Gameplay Tech Demo

items.name: Theron
items.story_profile: Theron is presented as a dangerous figure close to order, blades, shadows, and fate, with a sharper and more conflicted tone than the everyday romance setup first suggests.
items.voice_info: Official character voice clips are available in Chinese, English, and Japanese.
items.known_from: Official website, World Premiere PV, pre-registration reward campaign

items.name: Valen
items.story_profile: Valen is associated with ice, snow, purity, restraint, and fate, giving him the coldest and most mysterious image among the three revealed leads.
items.voice_info: Official character voice clips are available in Chinese, English, and Japanese.
items.known_from: Official website, World Premiere PV, Real-Time Gameplay Tech Demo

silentWhispersGameplayAndFeatures.title: Silent Whispers Gameplay and Core Features
silentWhispersGameplayAndFeatures.intro: Silent Whispers mixes cinematic romance, first-person interaction, freeform city exploration, time-loop storytelling, dates, and dangerous survival choices. Its public gameplay identity is story-first, built around emotional character interaction and choices inside the City of Fading Light.

items.name: Cinematic 4K Visuals
items.description: Silent Whispers uses Unreal Engine 5 to present high-fidelity 3D characters, city scenes, lighting, and cinematic romance moments.

items.name: First-Person Interactions
items.description: The game emphasizes intimate first-person moments, where the player experiences character scenes through close-up perspective and direct interaction.

items.name: Freeform Urban Exploration
items.description: Players are invited to explore the City of Fading Light, with public descriptions referencing cafes, aerial stations, a Ferris wheel, and everyday city routines.

items.name: Romantic Dates
items.description: Silent Whispers includes dates and everyday romantic encounters with the revealed male leads as part of its core fantasy.

items.name: Time Loop Narrative
items.description: The story uses a time-loop setup where choices, survival, and repeated attempts shape the player's journey through the city.

items.name: Dangerous Games
items.description: Beyond romance, the game places the player into perilous games involving survival, betrayal, and difficult decisions.

items.name: City of Fading Light
items.description: The main setting is a fantasy metropolis that looks familiar on the surface but hides illusion, danger, and strange rules beneath ordinary city life.

items.name: Cross-Platform Visual Focus
items.description: The development team has discussed PC and mobile visual balance, with character presentation treated as a central technical priority.

silentWhispersBeginnerGuide.title: Silent Whispers Beginner Guide
silentWhispersBeginnerGuide.intro: Start here for the confirmed basics of Silent Whispers: pre-registration, platforms, story setup, characters, gameplay features, and official update channels.

steps.title: Pre-register through the official site
steps.summary: Use the official Silent Whispers website as the main entry point for global pre-registration.
details: The official site is the safest starting point for pre-registration.
Pre-registration is open for the announced PC, iOS, and Android release.
Email verification on the website is for account or pre-registration confirmation, not a gift-code redeem system.

steps.title: Choose your target platform
steps.summary: Silent Whispers has been announced for PC, iOS, and Android.
details: PC, iOS, and Android are the confirmed platforms.
Store pages, client download links, system requirements, and final launch build details will follow through official channels.
Follow the official site and social channels for platform-specific download updates.

steps.title: Know the three confirmed male leads
steps.summary: The first confirmed romance options are Alarik, Theron, and Valen.
details: Alarik is presented as a powerful figure standing above rules and ordinary laws.
Theron is described as a sharp shadow on the edge of order and a prisoner of fate.
Valen is associated with purity, ice, snow, and a fate-heavy character image.

steps.title: Understand the world setup
steps.summary: The story takes place in the City of Fading Light, a fantasy metropolis where ordinary life hides dangerous games.
details: The city includes familiar daily spaces such as cafes, aerial stations, and a Ferris wheel.
The boundary between illusion and reality blurs as the player is drawn into survival scenarios.
The narrative uses a time-loop structure tied to choices and second chances.

steps.title: Learn the confirmed gameplay direction
steps.summary: The revealed feature set focuses on cinematic 4K visuals, first-person interaction, city exploration, and romance-driven choices.
details: The game is built with Unreal Engine 5.
Confirmed features include intimate first-person interactions and freeform urban exploration.
The public materials show a cinematic love-adventure format rather than a combat-first RPG format.

steps.title: Track official updates only
steps.summary: Use the official website, YouTube channel, X account, and Discord invite for launch news, videos, and event notices.
details: The official YouTube channel hosts the World Premiere PV, real-time gameplay tech demo, OST video, and later short-form demo posts.
The official X account has shared pre-registration and tech-demo updates.
Discord is the official community entry point linked from public Silent Whispers materials.

quickTips: Pre-registration through the official site is the main way to secure launch rewards.
PC, iOS, and Android are the confirmed platforms, with exact store pages to follow.
The game is a story-first cinematic love adventure built on Unreal Engine 5.
Use only official Silent Whispers channels for news, videos, and reward updates.

silentWhispersStoryAndWorld.title: Silent Whispers Story and World
silentWhispersStoryAndWorld.intro: Explore the City of Fading Light, the blurred line between reality and illusion, and the survival-driven romance at the center of Silent Whispers.

items.title: City of Fading Light
items.summary: The main setting is a fantasy metropolis that looks familiar on the surface but carries a hidden threat underneath.
details: The city is described through everyday spaces such as cafes, aerial stations, and a Ferris wheel in sunset light.
It is positioned as both a possible refuge and a place where survival matters.
The city supports the contrast between daily romance and dangerous game-like trials.

items.title: Reality and Illusion
items.summary: The story begins from a world where the border between illusion and reality starts to blur.
details: The player steps into a maze-like city of light and shadow.
The premise connects emotional intimacy with a larger survival mystery.
The public story materials emphasize uncertainty inside the setting, not a simple slice-of-life romance.

items.title: Everyday Romance
items.summary: Silent Whispers includes daily routines, dates, and small ordinary moments with the male leads.
details: The game highlights spending time in a living city.
Romantic scenes are paired with first-person closeness and cinematic presentation.
The official feature list frames romance as something tied to fate and repeated encounters.

items.title: Dangerous Games
items.summary: The romance setup is interrupted by perilous games that force choices around survival and betrayal.
details: The player is drawn into one dangerous game after another.
Survival and betrayal are part of the official story framing.
The game uses these trials to give romantic choices a darker, higher-stakes background.

items.title: Time Loop Narrative
items.summary: Time loops are a confirmed part of the story structure and are tied to choices for the next version of the player.
details: The official feature list names a time-loop narrative directly.
The premise asks what the player would risk for another chance.
Public previews connect the loop with making better choices across repeated lives.

items.title: Alarik
items.summary: Alarik is one of the three confirmed male leads and is framed around overwhelming power and rule-breaking authority.
details: His profile presents him as someone standing above rules.
His character image is tied to control, power, and a commanding presence.
He appears in the revealed PV and tech-demo materials.

items.title: Theron
items.summary: Theron is one of the three confirmed male leads and is associated with shadows, order, sharpness, and fate.
details: His official profile describes him as a blade-like figure on the edge of order.
A pre-registration reward is tied to a Theron event named "It's not like I'm posing for you."
He appears across the official reveal materials and public preview coverage.

items.title: Valen
items.summary: Valen is one of the three confirmed male leads and is presented with imagery of ice, snow, purity, and fate.
details: His official profile links him to ice-and-snow imagery.
Preview coverage notes that the world-premiere PV suggests a strong connection between Valen and the loop setup.
He is part of the first confirmed romance-option lineup.

silentWhispersTrailersAndTechDemo.title: Silent Whispers Trailers and Tech Demo
silentWhispersTrailersAndTechDemo.intro: The official Silent Whispers videos introduce the City of Fading Light, the three confirmed male leads, the cinematic UE5 visual direction, first-person interaction style, and the game's music tone.

items.title: Silent Whispers - World Premiere PV
confirms: Introduces the core Silent Whispers premise.
Shows the City of Fading Light atmosphere.
Presents the three confirmed male leads: Alarik, Theron, and Valen.
Connects romance, danger, and time-loop framing.

items.title: Silent Whispers Real-Time Gameplay Tech Demo
confirms: Shows close-up character realism, skin detail, clothing detail, and cinematic camera work.
Demonstrates the visual direction behind first-person romantic interaction scenes.
Official social posts describe the tech demo footage as captured in-engine.

items.title: Silent Whispers Original Soundtrack Vol. 1 - Illuminated Whispers
confirms: Introduces the music direction for Silent Whispers.
Uses the title "Illuminated Whispers" for the first original soundtrack release.
Official posts describe the album as original music from the in-engine tech demo.
Supports the game's emotional, cinematic romance tone.

items.title: Silent Whispers Official YouTube Channel
confirms: Collects the official English video uploads in one place.
Includes reveal videos, tech-demo content, OST content, and later short-form demo posts.
Useful for tracking new trailers before launch.

items.title: Silent Whispers Birds-Eye View Tech Demo
confirms: Official social listings identify this as a real-time rendered birds-eye-view tech demo.
The short-form format is used for additional visual showcases beyond the main PV and full tech demo.
Works as a compact update feed for new visual demonstrations.

silentWhispersCodesAndRedeemStatus.title: Silent Whispers Codes and Redeem Status
silentWhispersCodesAndRedeemStatus.intro: Track whether Silent Whispers has official gift codes, how redeem status differs from pre-registration, and where code news should be checked.

items.title: Active Silent Whispers Codes
details: No Silent Whispers-specific redeem codes are listed on the official website, official YouTube channel, official X account, or Discord invite landing page materials.
Pre-registration rewards are not gift codes.
This card will change only when an official Silent Whispers channel publishes a real redeem code.

items.title: Official Redeem System
details: The public official pages do not show a dedicated Silent Whispers code redemption page or in-game redeem menu yet.
The game has not launched publicly, so a normal in-game redeem flow is not available in the current public materials.
Use only official Silent Whispers announcements for future code-entry instructions.

items.title: Website Email Verification
details: A verification code used during website registration or account confirmation is only for confirming the registration process.
It should not be treated as a Silent Whispers reward code.
Keep email verification codes private and use them only on the official website.

items.title: Pre-Registration Rewards
items.code: No code required on public pages
items.reward: Sonnet avatar title, Theron event, 99 Stamina, 19,999 Eclipse Coins
items.expires: Launch-claim timing follows official launch instructions
details: Public coverage lists the Sonnet avatar title as a pre-registration reward.
A Theron-related event named "It's not like I'm posing for you." is included in the pre-registration reward set.
99 Stamina and 19,999 Eclipse Coins are listed as rewards for players who pre-register for launch.

items.title: Wrong-Game Code Warning
items.status: Do not use unrelated Whispers codes
details: Codes for other games using the word "Whispers" are not Silent Whispers codes.
Silent Whispers is published by Archosaur Games and developed by VVANNA STUDIO; code sources should match the official Silent Whispers channels.
Avoid pages that mix Silent Whispers with unrelated interactive-story code lists.

items.title: Official Code Sources to Watch
details: Official website: pre-registration and main game notices.
Official X account: announcement posts and short update notices.
Official Discord: community announcements after joining.
Official YouTube channel: trailers, tech demos, OST, and later official video notices.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Silent Whispers

questions.question: What is Silent Whispers?
questions.answer: Silent Whispers is a free-to-play cinematic love adventure game developed by VVANNA STUDIO and published by Archosaur Games, built with Unreal Engine 5 and set in the City of Fading Light.

questions.question: What platforms is Silent Whispers coming to?
questions.answer: Silent Whispers has been announced for PC, iOS, and Android. Exact store pages, client download links, and system requirements will be shared through the official website and social channels.

questions.question: Is there a Silent Whispers release date yet?
questions.answer: The exact release date for Silent Whispers is still to be announced. The game is in global pre-registration, and the launch date will be confirmed through official channels.

questions.question: Who are the main characters in Silent Whispers?
questions.answer: Silent Whispers has revealed three main romance characters: Alarik, Theron, and Valen. Each appears in the World Premiere PV and has official voice clips in Chinese, English, and Japanese.

questions.question: Are there any active Silent Whispers gift codes?
questions.answer: No active Silent Whispers gift codes are listed on the official channels right now. Pre-registration rewards like the Sonnet title, Stamina, and Eclipse Coins are separate from gift codes.

questions.question: How do I pre-register for Silent Whispers?
questions.answer: You can pre-register for Silent Whispers through the official website using the registration form. Pre-registration ties your account to launch rewards delivered once the game goes live.
